##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Michael Scott
##DESCRIPTION=Spherical radiating aggregates of clear colorless prismatic crystals with pyramidal terminations; sample is from the Tiba et al (1995) study, co-type specimen

##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R070271
